tasks.description: Document and store ticker pool in episodic memory, section by section.

subtasks.description: For each group of 10 tickers (and final group of 7), compile the ticker name, position, and conviction score.
Call episodic_remember to store first group of 10 ticker details under memory key 'first_10_tickers'.
Repeat episodic_remember process for next four groups: 'second_10_tickers', 'third_10_tickers', 'fourth_10_tickers', 'fifth_10_tickers'.

tasks.description: Analyze tickers for fundamental and risk/return characteristics and select preferred candidates from each group.

subtasks.description: For each group, call get_ticker_fundamental_data and get_ticker_performance_and_risk for each ticker to collect core metrics and risk/return profile.

tasks.description: Aggregate chosen tickers from episodic memory and construct initial portfolio.

subtasks.description: Call episodic_recall to gather all selected ticker choices from episodic memory (all 'choices_from_X_10_tickers' keys).
Determine portfolio candidate list, segmenting into required 18-20 long and 12-18 short positions and preliminary allocations per conviction and thesis.
Call build_portfolio with final ticker, position, and allocation data to create candidate portfolio.

tasks.description: Validate portfolio against all hard constraints and performance criteria. Iterate and adjust as needed to achieve requirements.

subtasks.description: Call portfolio_exposure_calculator for net and gross exposures; call calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index for beta check.
Call calculate_portfolio_returns_metrics and calculate_ticker_performances for annualized return, Sharpe ratio, and alpha analysis.
If portfolio does not meet ALL hard constraints, adjust holdings/allocations and repeat steps 4c, 5a, and 5b until satisfied.

tasks.description: Format and output portfolio in required JSON schema.

subtasks.description: Format the validated, constraint-conforming portfolio positions (ticker, position, thesis, key_drivers, allocation) into the specified output JSON array.
